title: geschollia occultans
side_effects: Geschollia occultans can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and swelling. Ingesting the plant can also lead to gastrointestinal issues, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap can cause skin irritation and burns, as well as respiratory problems, including coughing and shortness of breath. In severe cases, improper use of Geschollia occultans can even lead to seizures, coma, or even death.
